query:
SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.hostListingId, b.requestedDate, b.mealType, b.numberOfGuests, b.bookingStatus, b.paymentStatus, b.totalAmount
FROM bookings b
WHERE b.guestName LIKE '%Dustin%'
ORDER BY b.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute

ORDER BY b.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
